languages.text: "Я.... пожалуй, временно закрою глаза на отсутствие у Вольного Торговца {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патента{/g}, что, в сущности, означает лишение {mf|его|ее} высокого статуса и всех соответствующий привилегий... только давай, {name}, исправим эту "маленькую неприятность" как можно быстрее".

traits.locale_text: "Я.... пожалуй, временно закрою глаза на отсутствие у Вольного Торговца {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патента{/g}, что, в сущности, означает лишение {mf|его|ее} высокого статуса и всех соответствующий привилегий... только давай, {name}, исправим эту "маленькую неприятность" как можно быстрее".
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Я.... пожалуй, временно закрою глаза на отсутствие у Вольного Торговца {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патента{/g}, что, в сущности, означает лишение {mf|его|ее} высокого статуса и всех соответствующий привилегий... только давай, {name}, исправим эту "маленькую неприятность" как можно быстрее".

languages.text: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."
languages.original_text: "Я.... пожалуй, временно закрою глаза на отсутствие у Вольного Торговца {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Патента{/g}, что, в сущности, означает лишение {mf|его|ее} высокого статуса и всех соответствующий привилегий... только давай, {name}, исправим эту "маленькую неприятность" как можно быстрее".

traits.locale_text: "I shall... temporarily close my eyes to the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which, in essence, means the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Only let us, {name}, rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible."

"I shall... temporarily close my eyes to the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which, in essence, means the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Only let us, {name}, rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible."

"I shall... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

"I shall... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

"I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

languages.text: «Voy a... pasar por alto temporalmente el que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente no tenga la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Patente{/g}, algo que normalmente implicaría la revocación de su estatus y los privilegios que lo acompañan. Será mejor que arreglemos este "pequeño inconveniente" cuanto antes, {name}».
languages.original_text: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

traits.locale_text: «Voy a... pasar por alto temporalmente el que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente no tenga la {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Patente{/g}, algo que normalmente implicaría la revocación de su estatus y los privilegios que lo acompañan. Será mejor que arreglemos este "pequeño inconveniente" cuanto antes, {name}».

languages.text: “我将……暂时搁置行商浪人缺失{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}贸易授状{/g}这一事实，毕竟这实质上意味着其崇高地位及一切随之而来的特权均将被褫夺。我们务必尽快弥补这桩‘小小的不便’才是，{name}。”
languages.original_text: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

traits.locale_text: “我将……暂时搁置行商浪人缺失{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}贸易授状{/g}这一事实，毕竟这实质上意味着其崇高地位及一切随之而来的特权均将被褫夺。我们务必尽快弥补这桩‘小小的不便’才是，{name}。”

languages.text: « Je vais... temporairement ignorer l'absence de {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}, qui suppose la révocation du statut {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} et tous les privilèges qui y sont liés. Contentons-nous de régler ce petit inconvénient aussi rapidement que possible, {name}. »
languages.original_text: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais... temporairement ignorer l'absence de {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}lettre de marque{/g}, qui suppose la révocation du statut {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} et tous les privilèges qui y sont liés. Contentons-nous de régler ce petit inconvénient aussi rapidement que possible, {name}. »

languages.text: "Hür Tacir'in özünde yüksek makamının ve buna bağlı tüm ayrıcalıkların geri alınması anlamına gelecek olan {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatname'nin{/g} eksikliğini... Geçici olarak görmezden geleceğim. Gelin bu 'küçük rahatsızlığı' olabildiğince çabuk giderelim."
languages.original_text: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir'in özünde yüksek makamının ve buna bağlı tüm ayrıcalıkların geri alınması anlamına gelecek olan {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Ruhsatname'nin{/g} eksikliğini... Geçici olarak görmezden geleceğim. Gelin bu 'küçük rahatsızlığı' olabildiğince çabuk giderelim."

languages.text: "Ich werde ... vorübergehend über den fehlenden {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Handelsbrief{/g}hinwegsehen, dessen Verlust letztlich die Aberkennung des Titels {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} und aller damit verbundenen Privilegien bedeuten würde. Lasst uns diese 'kleine Unannehmlichkeit' aber rasch beheben, {name}."
languages.original_text: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde ... vorübergehend über den fehlenden {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Handelsbrief{/g}hinwegsehen, dessen Verlust letztlich die Aberkennung des Titels {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} und aller damit verbundenen Privilegien bedeuten würde. Lasst uns diese 'kleine Unannehmlichkeit' aber rasch beheben, {name}."

languages.text: 「ローグ・トレーダーが{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} を持っていないことを一時的に見過ごすことにしよう。この "些細な不都合 "をできるだけ速やかに是正しよう、{name} 。"
languages.original_text: "I will... temporarily overlook the Rogue Trader's lack of a {g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g}, which would, in essence, mean the revocation of {mf|his|her} high station and all attendant privileges. Let us just rectify this 'minor inconvenience' as swiftly as possible, {name}."

traits.locale_text: 「ローグ・トレーダーが{g|Encyclopedia:WarrantGlossary}Warrant{/g} を持っていないことを一時的に見過ごすことにしよう。この "些細な不都合 "をできるだけ速やかに是正しよう、{name} 。"
